chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1572 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْمُؤْمِنُ مُعَقِّبٌ مَا دَامَ عَلَى وُضُوءٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1572 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"A believer remains in a state of spiritual reward (mu'aqqib) as long as they are in a state of ritual purity (wudhu)”.
